REMOVED FROM JURY TRIAL CALENDAR ON OCT-26-2017 IN DEPT. 502 - PARTIES HAVE REACHED AN AGREEMENT ON SETTLEMENT. PLAINTIFF SHALL PURCHASE 170 CHICAGO WAY, SAN FRANCISCO, CA ("THE PROPERTY") FOR PAYMENT OF $262,000.00 AND THE PLAINTIFF IS TO PAY OFF ALL EXISTINGS LOANS UP TO, BUT NOT EXCEEDING, $476,000.00*. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT SHALL COMPLETE THE PURCHASE ON OR BEFORE JANUARY 10TH, 2018 USING THE ESCROW OF PLAINTIFF'S CHOOSING. PLAINTIFF SHALL PAY MINIMUM MONTHLY PAYMENTS DUE FOR THE MORTGAGES AND PROPERTY TAX AGAINST PROPERTY THROUGH CLOSING. PLAINTIFF SHALL PROVIDE PLAINTIFF CURRENT MONTHLY MORTGAGE STATEMENTS SHOWING CURRENT BALANCES AND MONTHLY PAYMENTS OWING WITHIN SEVEN DAYS OF THIS AGREEMENT. PLAINTIFF SHALL DISMISS THIS CASE WITHIN 10 DAY OF CLOSE OF ESCROW. DEFENDANT SHALL DISMISS CUD-16-438350 WITHIN 10 DAYS OF CLOSE OF ESCROW. THE PARTIES WILL PREPARE AND EXECUTE A MORE FORMAL AGREEMENT WITHIN 10 DAYS OF EXECUTION OF THIS AGREEMENT. THE PARTIES SHALL SIGN MUTUAL RELEASES. DEFENDANT SHALL EXECUTE ANY DOCUMENTS NECESSARY TO ALLOW TRANSFER OF THE PROPERTY TO PLAINTIFF OR HER ASSIGNS. ALTHOUGH THE PARTIES ARE PREPARING A MORE FORMAL AGREEMENT, THIS AGREEMENT IS FIND AND BINDING AND ENFORCABLE BY THE COURT PURSUANT TO CIVIL CODE OF PROCEDURE 664.6, EACH SIDE SHALL BEAR THEIR OWN ATTORNEY'S FEES AND COST. * IF THE AMOUNT OF LOANS EXCEED $476,000.00 THE AMOUNT OF THE PAYMENT OF $262,000.00 WILL BE REDUCED BY THE LOANS EXCEED $476,000.00 MATTER IS CONTINUED TO JANUARY 29TH, 2018 AT 9:30AM FOR STATUS OF SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. COUNSEL WAIVES NOTICE. PROCEEDINGS NOT REPORTED; JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: JOHNNY SENGMANY (D611).

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Enforcement Of The Residential Purchase Agreement Pursuant To The Settlement Agreement, Or Alternatively For The Rescission Of The Entire Settlement Agreement Due To Continued Nonperformance By Plaintiff
Off Calendar Dec-08-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances via Courtcall:
Edward C. Singer, Esq., (650) 393-5862 , appearing for Hanh Troung, Plaintiff
John Chow, Esq., (415) 398-8308 , appearing for Raymond Wong, for Defendant
Court interpreter: Winnie Chan. Oath on file.

ARGUED. Mr. Chow provided case backgropund. Mr. Singer reported that parties are unable to work with each other and that he is in agreement with the settlement being recinded and this matter moving foward to trial.

The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT RAYMOND WONG'S Motion For The Rescission Of The Entire Settlement Agreement Due To Continued Nonperformance By Plaintiff is granted. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines, Clerk: N. Wong, Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Enforcement Of The Residential Purchase Agreement Pursuant To The Settlement Agreement, Or Alternatively For The Rescission Of The Entire Settlement Agreement Due To Continued Nonperformance By Plaintiff
Off Calendar Oct-21-2020 Continued To Dec-08-20 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: Appearances via Courtcall and in person:
John Chow, Esq., 415-398-8308, appearing for Raymond Wong, Defendant.
Edward Singer, Esq., 650-393-5862, appearing for Hanh Truong, Plaintiff.

ARGUED. The Court questioned if an escrow was opened. Mr. Singer stated that he did open an escrow and described the efforts that he made to address the abatement issues. Mr. Chow argued that the documents that needed a signature were not provided to his client and confirmed that his client did want to go through with the sale.

The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT RAYMOND WONG'S Motion For Enforcement Of The Residential Purchase Agreement Pursuant To The Settlement Agreement, Or Alternatively For The Rescission Of The Entire Settlement Agreement Due To Continued Nonperformance By Plaintiff is continued to December 08, 2020 at 9:30am, in D501. Judge: Charles F. Haines, Clerk: N. Wong, Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Motion For Sanctions
Off Calendar Mar-11-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT RAYMOND WONG Notice Of Motion For Sanctions is DENIED. Plaintiff's request for sanctions in the amount of $1,200 under CCP 128.5(g) is granted. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC3.1312(b). Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: N. Wong, Not reported (D501)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-02-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT RAYMOND WONG'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. Complaint contains sufficient allegations and, as alleged, is not barred by the statue of limitation and/or statute of frauds. Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b).
